title: McAlive:Colorfull sugarcane
description: This is an addon to the pack Mc:Alive:Verdant which makes sugarcane have mixed colors
body:
This is an addon my resource pack [McAlive:Verdant](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcaliveverdant)  which makes sugarcane have red black and green colors and changes the item texture (see images)

How to apply:
Put the addon above the base pack like this:
![tut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b6d9d29ea604e874d0776dd09452e791a461253.png)
